title: Health
subtitle: See all your health data in one place

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Your daily wellbeing at a glance
dashboard.errorDescription: Something went wrong loading your daily health stats. Please try again.

weight.title: Weight
weight.subtitle: Track your weight and body composition over time

form.description: Record your weight and, optionally, your body composition.
form.weightInvalid: Enter a weight greater than zero.
form.saveError: Couldn't save your weight entry. Please try again.

target.title: Set weight target
target.description: Choose a goal weight, or clear the field to remove it.
target.hint: Leave empty to remove your target.
target.saveError: Couldn't update your weight target. Please try again.

empty.title: No weight entries yet
empty.description: Log your weight to start tracking your progress over time.

error.title: Couldn't load your weight history
error.description: Something went wrong loading your weight entries. Please try again.

delete.title: Delete weight entry
delete.body: This weight entry will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
delete.error: Couldn't delete the weight entry. Please try again.

steps.title: Steps
steps.subtitle: Track your daily step count over time

form.description: Record your step count for the day.
form.stepsInvalid: Enter a step count greater than zero.
form.saveError: Couldn't save your steps entry. Please try again.

target.title: Set steps target
target.description: Choose a daily steps goal, or clear the field to remove it.
target.hint: Leave empty to remove your target.
target.saveError: Couldn't update your steps target. Please try again.

empty.title: No steps entries yet
empty.description: Log your steps to start tracking your activity over time.

error.title: Couldn't load your steps history
error.description: Something went wrong loading your steps entries. Please try again.

delete.title: Delete steps entry
delete.body: This steps entry will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
delete.error: Couldn't delete the steps entry. Please try again.

rhr.title: Resting heart rate
rhr.subtitle: Track your resting heart rate over time

empty.title: No resting heart rate data yet
empty.description: Resting heart rate is recorded alongside your sleep. Sync a device that tracks it to see your trend here.

error.title: Couldn't load your resting heart rate history
error.description: Something went wrong loading your resting heart rate data. Please try again.

sleep.title: Sleep
sleep.subtitle: Track your sleep duration and quality over time

form.description: Record your sleep duration and, optionally, the stage breakdown and metrics.
form.totalSleepRequired: Please enter how long you slept.
form.endBeforeStart: Sleep end must be after the start time.
form.saveError: Couldn't save your sleep entry. Please try again.

target.title: Set sleep target
target.description: Choose a nightly sleep goal, or clear the fields to remove it.
target.hint: Leave empty to remove your target.
target.saveError: Couldn't update your sleep target. Please try again.

empty.title: No sleep entries yet
empty.description: Log a night's sleep to start tracking your rest over time.

error.title: Couldn't load your sleep history
error.description: Something went wrong loading your sleep entries. Please try again.

delete.title: Delete sleep entry
delete.body: This sleep entry will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
delete.error: Couldn't delete the sleep entry. Please try again.

water.title: Water intake
water.subtitle: Track your daily water intake over time

form.description: Record your water intake for the day.
form.amountInvalid: Enter an amount greater than zero.
form.saveError: Couldn't save your water entry. Please try again.

target.title: Set water target
target.description: Choose a daily water goal, or clear the field to remove it.
target.hint: Leave empty to remove your target.
target.saveError: Couldn't update your water target. Please try again.

empty.title: No water entries yet
empty.description: Log your water intake to start tracking your hydration over time.

error.title: Couldn't load your water history
error.description: Something went wrong loading your water entries. Please try again.

delete.title: Delete water entry
delete.body: This water entry will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
delete.error: Couldn't delete the water entry. Please try again.

poop.title: Bowel movements
poop.subtitle: Track your bowel movements over time

form.description: Record the time and details of your bowel movement.
form.dateTimeRequired: Please choose a date and time.
form.saveError: Couldn't save your entry. Please try again.

target.title: Set bowel movement target
target.description: Choose a daily bowel movement goal, or clear the field to remove it.
target.hint: Leave empty to remove your target.
target.saveError: Couldn't update your target. Please try again.

empty.title: No entries yet
empty.description: Log a bowel movement to start tracking over time.

error.title: Couldn't load your history
error.description: Something went wrong loading your entries. Please try again.

delete.title: Delete entry
delete.body: This entry will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
delete.error: Couldn't delete the entry. Please try again.

fasting.title: Fasting
fasting.subtitle: Start a fast, track your progress, and review your history

active.title: Fast in progress
active.completeHint: You can complete the fast once you reach your target.

form.description: Choose a fasting protocol and when it started.
form.customDurationHint: Length of the fast, in hours (1–72).
form.saveError: Couldn't save your fasting session. Please try again.

target.title: Set fasting target
target.description: Choose a target fasting duration, or clear both fields to remove it.
target.hint: Leave both empty to remove your target.
target.saveError: Couldn't update your fasting target. Please try again.

complete.error: Couldn't end your fast. Please try again.

empty.title: No fasts yet
empty.description: Start a fast to begin tracking your fasting history.

error.title: Couldn't load your fasting history
error.description: Something went wrong loading your fasting sessions. Please try again.

delete.title: Delete fasting session
delete.body: This fasting session will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
delete.error: Couldn't delete the fasting session. Please try again.
